implementation_deviations: jq filter syntax: 'fromjson? as $r' to '(fromjson?) as $r' (jq 1.7 compatibility)
emit_extracted: per-file jq fork -> single batched jq with input_filename to derive PROJECT/SESSION (performance: 36s -> 1.7s)
gsub control char normalization moved from jq side to awk side using SOH sentinel (avoids jq 1.7 Oniguruma overhead while preserving SNIPPET @tsv-escape spec)
precompile_filters: only exit code 3 (jq compile error) is fatal; runtime errors from jq -n (e.g. input_filename null) are ignored
public_contract_invariants: SNIPPET is jq @tsv-escaped (literal \t/\n sequences appear as \\t/\\n)
Output order: time-ascending within jsonl, undefined across jsonl
